---
name: New Skill Proposal
about: Propose a new specialized agent skill for the repository.
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: new-skill
assignees: ''

---

**Skill Name**
Use lowercase kebab-case (e.g. `designer-3d-model`).

**Skill Description**
What does this skill do? Explain in one or two sentences.

**Category**
Select one of:
- Strategy and Design
- Responsive and Typography
- Motion and Interaction
- Architecture
- Domain UX
- Quality and Delivery

**Use Case (When to use)**
- Scenario 1
- Scenario 2

**Avoid Case (When NOT to use)**
- Scenario 1

**Inputs and Outputs**
- Inputs required by the agent:
- Expected deliverables / outputs:

**Companion Skills**
Which other skills should this work with?
